---
title: Brand 4
engine: knitr
brand:
  color:
    palette:
      coral-blaze: "#e0605e"
      sunset-orange: "#e8883a"
      golden-hour: "#d4b34e"
      dusty-rose: "#c27085"
      deep-magenta: "#a34f8b"
    background:
      dark: "#1c1318"
      light: "#fdf6f8"
    foreground:
      dark: "#e8a0b0"
      light: "#7a3050"
    dark:
      dark: "#1c1318"
      light: "#7a3050"
    light:
      dark: "#e8a0b0"
      light: "#fdf6f8"
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Bebas Neue
        source: bunny
      - family: Open Sans
        source: bunny
      - family: IBM Plex Mono
        source: bunny
    base: Open Sans
    headings: Bebas Neue
    monospace: IBM Plex Mono
---

{{< include /brands/_r.qmd >}}
